assertions.title: table_as is a first-class storage identity across reads and foreign hydration

steps.expected: Alias metadata and lookup helpers resolve through the target storage identity

steps.action: Run focused alias foreign roundtrip regression
steps.expected: save/get/list/list_limit keep alias reads consistent while storing target-table RecordIds

steps.action: Run focused nested alias hydration regression
steps.expected: get/get_record/list/list_limit hydrate nested alias foreign graphs consistently
Derived HasId/ResolveRecordId and Bridge hydration use canonical storage identity
steps.observed: macros/src/lib.rs uses ModelMeta::storage_table() for HasId/ResolveRecordId and Bridge hydrate dispatch matches payload storage_table()

evidence.rawStorage: integration_db helpers/assertions cover target-table RecordId storage for alias-backed parent and nested alias rows

assertions.title: README and rustdoc distinguish recommended public API from internal helpers

steps.expected: README steers callers to model-level CRUD and distinguishes internal Repo helpers
steps.observed: README recommends model save/save_many/create/get/list and explicitly de-emphasizes appdb::repository::Repo::<T> as internal/helper-oriented

steps.action: Review schema contract guidance in README
steps.expected: README separates schema-managed startup from schemaless persistence guarantees
steps.observed: README explicitly separates DbRuntime::open*/init_db* managed startup from schemaless save/upsert persistence guarantees

steps.action: Review generated rustdoc/API comments and compile surface
steps.expected: Inherent API docs and facade tests reinforce the intended public path
steps.observed: macros/src/lib.rs docs mark generated model methods as the recommended Store CRUD surface; cargo test -p appdb --test facade_exports passed

assertions.title: Regression matrix separates schema side effects from business semantics

steps.action: Review integration test matrix around milestone assertions
steps.expected: Focused regressions exist per contract area instead of one broad side-effect-heavy proof
steps.observed: core/tests/integration_db.rs contains separate focused tests for schema bootstrap, explicit-id persistence, decode behavior, table_as identity, and read consistency

steps.expected: Mission artifacts map validation ownership to discrete proof slices
steps.observed: milestone-f-focused-regression-matrix-separation-evidence.json passed and synthesis.json reports the milestone reviews passed

steps.expected: Concrete tests independently prove schema, persistence, alias, and decode promises
steps.observed: Named focused tests include fresh_db_save_requires_no_manual_define_table, schemaless_foreign_save_bootstraps_child_tables_without_schema_side_effects, and three table_as-specific regressions

summary: Validated 3 assigned assertions on the cargo-test/file-review surface: VAL-HYDRATE-008 passed via three focused table_as regressions plus macro identity review, VAL-API-001 passed via README/rustdoc/facade export evidence, and VAL-TEST-001 passed via focused regression-matrix and scrutiny evidence.
